name: manfred-toolkit
description: Manfred-flavoured designer toolkit: UX writing (Manfred voice baked in), case studies, design rationale, design-system adoption + token audit, presentation decks, meeting summaries (bilingual SV/EN), and the LinkedIn (Swedish) post trio. Voice rules from shared/manfred-brand.md enforced; errors explain don't blame; quick test: could I read this aloud without cringing?
